come in.translate: 1) Входить (в помещение) 2) Поступать (о деньгах, информации)(Приблизительные синонимы)
examples: We're waiting for results to come in.
Please come in and sit down.
He came in late to the meeting.
The sun comes in through the window.
The orders started coming in yesterday.
Come in, the door is open!
How much income comes in each month?
Reports are coming in from the field.
come in.synonyms:
Входить (в помещение) - enter, go in
Поступать (о деньгах, информации) - arrive, be received
